prompt: 用 tour-guide-content skill 幫日月潭一日遊加上每個景點的照片，像九份十分那樣每個景點都有 Unsplash 照片和攝影者標註
expected_output: A Node.js update script with: (1) PHOTOS object containing verified Unsplash URLs for each attraction, (2) zh-TW/en/ja content with photoMd() calls in each h3 section, (3) photographer credit in correct Unsplash attribution format
assertions: Content has no NT$ prices or admission fees
Every h3 section has a ![](unsplash-url) image
Every image has *📷 Photo by* credit line with UTM params
All Unsplash image URLs return HTTP 200
Photo locations match the attraction (not a different city)
zh-TW content uses colloquial Taiwanese expressions
ja content is shorter than zh-TW
Itinerary has realistic drive times
Food recommendations name specific shops

prompt: 太魯閣攻略的內容太空洞了，幫我用 tour-guide-content skill 重寫，要有砂卡礑步道、燕子口、長春祠等景點的實景照片
expected_output: Updated content for taroko-gorge with per-attraction photos for Shakadang Trail, Swallow Grotto, Changchun Shrine, etc. Each section vivid and detailed with food, photo tips, and practical advice.
assertions: Mentions specific attractions: 砂卡礑, 燕子口, 長春祠
Each attraction has a verified Unsplash photo
Content describes what you actually see at each spot
Includes hiking difficulty/shoe recommendations
No prices or admission fees
Three languages with consistent structure

prompt: 幫 RelayGo 新增一條「台南古蹟美食一日遊」攻略，包含赤崁樓、安平古堡、神農街、花園夜市，要有照片
expected_output: Complete new guide with: insert script for tour_guides table, per-attraction Unsplash photos, full zh-TW/en/ja content, appropriate slug/tags/city/vehicle_type
assertions: Creates a new record (INSERT or UPSERT, not just PATCH)
slug follows kebab-case convention
city is '台南'
Each of the 4 attractions has its own photo section
Food recommendations are Tainan-specific (牛肉湯, 棺材板, etc.)
No prices
Includes practical tip about Tainan heat/sun
